details: The agent correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories backed by kubectl evidence: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (app exits with code 1), fault-endpoints (selector label mismatch app=web-backend-v2 vs app=web-backend), fault-imagepull (nonexistent image tag), fault-init (init container crash loop from migration lock error), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled with 25Mi limit), fault-pvc (missing fast-ssd StorageClass), fault-readiness (probe on port 8080 but nginx on 80), fault-rollout (stalled rollout with invalid image causing ProgressDeadlineExceeded), fault-unschedulable (nodeSelector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 not present on node). The healthy namespace was correctly not flagged. All diagnoses are directly supported by the command outputs shown in the trajectory.
